MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUEST, DEMAND INSPECTION, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS
Off Calendar Sep-14-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's motion to compel responses to request for production set #2 is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve verified responses without objection within 15 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $236.30 are to be paid within 15 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
